title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. microcomum
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. microcomum, also known as the small hawkweed or micro hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. microcomum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
